text:
Market today: Tech and chips are seeing mixed signals. Positive momentum from Meta and a strong chip debut are offset by legal drama in the AI space. Your heavy concentration in tech and chip names means these trends are key, and trading on margin amplifies every move.

Your holdings: SOXL (-24.46%) and SPAL (-27.71%) are both leveraged ETFs, deep in the red, and subject to decay. SPAL is a new, very volatile position. These need immediate attention, especially since margin amplifies their drawdowns.

Watch: Keep a close eye on broader AI sentiment following the Apple/OpenAI news. Also, watch for continued strength in the chip sector after SK Hynix's strong debut.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing your leveraged losing positions and stay alert to sector-wide sentiment shifts.
plays: SOXL (-24.46%) and SPAL (-27.71%) are leveraged ETFs that decay and are deep in the red. Consider trimming or exiting these positions to respect their stops and reduce margin exposure.
Your CRWD holding has a scanner 'ACCUMULATE' setup: entry 186.84-186.65, stop 185.53. This could be an add if you want to average down or increase exposure.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
